channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Weekly)

item.title: 🐘 Lincoln012015/Clipon-CMS (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Lincoln012015

📝 Repository: Lincoln012015/Clipon-CMS

📄 Descrizione: Turn any existing PHP/HTML website into a manageable site in minutes. Clipon CMS is a lightweight flat-file CMS that requires no MySQL. Just drop it in, add class="clipon" to any HTML element, and get live inline editing, blog management, media uploads, private analytics, and more instantly. Ultra-fast and zero-config setup.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: analytics cms flat-file flat-file-cms inline-editing inline-editor lightweight-cms no-database php php-cms

📜 Licenza: Mozilla Public License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-11T10:36:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-15T16:11:44Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 ideaseek-zh/trading-studio (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ideaseek-zh

📝 Repository: ideaseek-zh/trading-studio

📄 Descrizione: Trading Studio 是一个由珠海市智寻科技有限公司开发的面向中国 A 股市场的开源事件驱动型 AI 投资研究平台。平台整合行情数据、财经新闻、公司公告及重要企业事件，并提供基于事实与数据的 AI 分析和智能问答能力，帮助用户更高效地获取信息、分析事件与辅助投资研究。适合个人投资者及小型投研团队使用。

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: trading-studio

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-12T09:15:11Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-17T03:41:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

item.title: 🐘 tigusigalpa/coinglass-php (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tigusigalpa

📝 Repository: tigusigalpa/coinglass-php

📄 Descrizione: Framework-agnostic PHP SDK for the Coinglass API v4, with first-class Laravel 10–13 integration. Typed access to Futures, Spot, Options, ETF, On-Chain, and Indicator endpoints, automatic retry on rate limits, plus a real-time WebSocket client for liquidation orders, trades, and ticker snapshots, with no extra WebSocket dependency required

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: api bitcoin chainlink coinglass coinglass-api laravel nearprotocol php

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-12T19:09:20Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-13T05:56:43Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
